what_it_does: TypeScript declaration file for a React Modal dialog component. Declares the ModalProps interface (extending React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) and exports the Modal function component (returning JSX.Element | null) plus a default export.
observations: ModalProps fields: open (boolean), onClose (() => void), title (React.ReactNode), footer (React.ReactNode).
Docstring describes a warm-dim backdrop plus a raised panel, controlled via the open prop.
Closes on backdrop click, Escape key, or the close button (per docstring).
Return type is JSX.Element | null — implying it renders nothing when closed.
standouts: Controlled-component contract (open + onClose) with three documented close paths.
'warm-dim backdrop' framing ties the dialog's appearance to the design system's warm palette.
conventions: Controlled-component pattern (open/onClose) rather than internal state.
Extends standard div HTMLAttributes; minimal additive prop surface.
JSDoc documents behaviour the type alone cannot express (close triggers).
notes: The .d.ts contract for the Modal dialog — a controlled (open/onClose) warm-dim backdrop with a raised panel, title, and footer slots.
questions: Where is focus-trapping/portal behaviour defined (not expressed in the type)?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — the docstring describes a controlled modal dialog and the interface declares exactly the open/onClose/title/footer props that supports.
intention_signals: Aims to give the design system a small, controlled modal contract with title and footer slots and conventional close behaviour.
contribution: Contributes the typed contract for the design system's modal dialog — the open/onClose controlled surface and the title/footer slots.
summary_for_embedding: TypeScript .d.ts declaring ModalProps and the Modal React component, a controlled warm-dim-backdrop dialog with title and footer slots that closes on backdrop click, Escape, or close button.
intention_for_embedding: To define the typed contract for a controlled modal dialog component in the design system.
